innateAbility.name: Bright Speed
innateAbility.description: Grants the Fundamental bonus movement speed per amount of intelligence.

abilities.name: Illuminate
abilities.description: The longer the channel, the stronger the damage power.Once released, a wave is sent forth that deals damage in its path.

abilities.name: Release Illuminate
abilities.description: Release the illuminated channel early for both the Fundemental Form and the Spirit Form.

abilities.name: Blinding Light
abilities.description: Applies a knockback, blind, and damages all enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Chakra Magic
abilities.description: Restores mana and reduces all basic abilities' current cooldown by a fixed amount.

abilities.name: Solar Bind
abilities.description: Reduces unit-targeted enemy's magic resistance, and applies a movement speed slow that intensifies the more the debuff-affected enemy unit moves.

abilities.name: Will-O-Wisp
abilities.description: Summons Ignis Fatuus at the area-targeted location.As it alternates on and off, affected enemy units are drawn closer with its mesmerising flicker.

abilities.name: Spirit Form
abilities.description: The Spirit Form grants Ezalor bonus cast range, along with the Solar Bind ability.

talents.right: +0.25x Bright Speed (Spirit Form) Move Speed Factor
